653 GG0170B1_SIT_LYNG_STRT_CD GG0170B1_SIT_LYNG_STRT_CD GG0170B1 Mobility: Sit to Lying Ability at Start of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to move from a sitting to lying position at the start of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
